heading: Reorganization of Agency for International Development
label: 6581 Reorganization of Agency for International Development
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsec. (a), was in the original “this subdivision”, meaning subdiv. A of div. G112 Stat. 2681–793Oct. 21, 1998“This title [enacting this subchapter], and the amendments made by this title, shall take effect on the earlier of—“(1); orApril 1, 1999“(2)the date of reorganization [] of the Agency for International Development pursuant to the reorganization plan described in section 1601 [].”Apr. 1, 199922 U.S.C. 6601

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Agency for International Development shall be reorganized in accordance with this chapter and the reorganization plan transmitted pursuant to .section 6601 of this title
